title: Service Internal Traffic Policy — How it works
text:
The kube-proxy filters the endpoints it routes to based on the
spec.internalTrafficPolicy
setting. When it's set to
Local
, only node local
endpoints are considered. When it's
Cluster
(the default), or is not set,
Kubernetes considers all endpoints.

Read about
Topology Aware Routing
Read about
Service External Traffic Policy
Follow the
Connecting Applications with Services
tutorial
